series_metadata.series_title: Requests for Stop or Cancellation of Warrant and Applications for Replacement Warrants
series_metadata.series_description: Request to invalidate a state warrant that was never received, lost or stolen, or to issue a new warrant to replace one that was lost, stolen, or never received.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
